mechanism_proof_points: Historical precedent: 'hundreds of billions, even trillions in profits'
Iraq's proven oil reserves (second largest in world)

headline.text: Get Rich Safely With This One Good Investment. Here's How Rebuilding The Oil Industry In A FREE Iraq Can Hand You A Stunning Opportunity To Safely Multiply Your Money 9 Times And Turn $5,000 Into $45,000!

lead.full_text: It's About OIL. Now That the Conflict To Free Iraq Is Over, the Richest Prize In the World Can Pile Almost Unlimited Profits Into Your Portfolio... Iraq's oil treasure is YOURS... Once Every 10 Years You Get The Opportunity To Secure Your Financial Future Forever. The Key Is Recognizing When This Happens. Inside Is This Remarkable Investment.

three_part_structure.part_1_past_belief: Oil investments are risky and require extensive market knowledge and perfect timing
three_part_structure.part_2_new_mechanism: Geopolitical reconstruction creates asymmetric opportunity windows where safety and massive returns converge due to government-backed rebuilding contracts
three_part_structure.part_3_future_promise: This rare convergence of safety (UN backing, US companies favored) and extraordinary returns (9X potential) happens once every 10 years

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: You weren't wrong to miss opportunities - you just didn't have the framework to recognize these rare convergence moments
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Creates narrative where war's end = wealth creation window that is BOTH safe (UN Security Council approval, US company preference) AND explosive (9X returns)

mechanism.name: Post-War Reconstruction Profit Window
proof_elements: Historical precedent: 'hundreds of billions, even trillions in profits'
Iraq's proven oil reserves (second largest in world)

offer.price_anchoring: Rare opportunity valued at turning $5,000 into $45,000 (9X return) - available for subscription price
offer.guarantee: Once every 10 years opportunity - timing emphasized over money-back
bonuses: Dan Denning's analysis and track record

fssit_candidates.statement: Once Every 10 Years You Get The Opportunity To Secure Your Financial Future Forever. The Key Is Recognizing When This Happens.
fssit_candidates.analysis: Reframes all past missed opportunities as simply not recognizing the pattern - removes blame from skill/knowledge deficit and places it on pattern recognition

fssit_candidates.statement: It's About OIL. Now That the Conflict To Free Iraq Is Over, the Richest Prize In the World Can Pile Almost Unlimited Profits Into Your Portfolio
fssit_candidates.analysis: Reorganizes war/conflict into wealth opportunity framework - creates new schema where geopolitical events = investment windows

fssit_candidates.statement: U.S. companies expect to gain the most lucrative oil deals worth hundreds of billions, even trillions in profits
fssit_candidates.analysis: Provides scale and government backing as safety mechanism - reorganizes 'risky war zone investment' into 'government-backed opportunity'

fssit_candidates.statement: A Rare Opportunity To Combine Extraordinary Profits With Unusual Safety
fssit_candidates.analysis: Core schema violation - safety and extraordinary returns are typically inverse. This reorganizes the entire risk/reward framework

fssit_candidates.statement: Dan Denning has uncovered some of the world's most profitable investments. He says this little-known investment has very little risk, 9X your money potential and is still cheap in price
fssit_candidates.analysis: Credibility + safety + massive returns + cheap price = complete reorganization of what 'good investment' means
Ownership reframe - from distant geopolitical event to personal wealth entitlement
